channel.title: SevenAtSevenSportsAndEntertainment
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SevenAtSevenSportsAndEntertainment, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Rondale Moore, Vikings Wide Receiver, Dead at 25
item.description: The NFL has lost a bright star. Rondale Moore, who was a wide receiver for the Minnesota Vikings, has died of a suspected self-inflicted gunshot wound...
